name: Pencil
description: Generative AI platform for creating, testing and scaling high-performing advertising creatives at enterprise scale.

seo.title: Pencil — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Pencil: Generative AI platform for creating, testing and scaling high-performing advertising creatives at enterprise scale.

when_to_use: Generating and testing ad creatives at scale with generative AI
Scaling high-performing video ads for mobile UA campaigns
Iterating on creative variants for paid social performance

pros: Generative AI creative production at scale
cons: Not a DSP, pairs with your ad platforms
AI outputs still need human review
review.verdict: Useful creative factory for large advertisers, but requires pairing with actual media buying.
review.best_for: Enterprise brands testing many ad variations across Meta, TikTok, and programmatic.
review.not_for: Small advertisers or anyone confusing this for a buying or monetization platform.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
